overview: Mono-Black Pox is a Legacy control deck that leverages disruption and board wipes to stabilize against aggressive strategies. By deploying Pox to reduce all creatures to 0/1, the deck turns opponent threats into liabilities while advancing with cheap creatures and planeswalkers. The provided signature cards enable early disruption, targeted removal, and efficient threat generation to secure long-term board control.
win_conditions: Pox combined with low-cost creatures to outvalue opponents
Thoughtseize disruption to strip key combo pieces or finishers
Sinkhole removal to clear high-toughness threats and enable Pox's effect
Orcish Bowmasters as a resilient attacker and removal tool under Pox

keep_criteria: Hands containing Thoughtseize or Sinkhole for early interaction
Pox paired with at least two mana sources
Orcish Bowmasters with a removal spell or Pox
mulligan_criteria: No interaction or board presence in the opening hand
Mana-heavy hands lacking Pox or cheap threats
Hands with only high-cost cards and no disruption

early_game: Use Thoughtseize to disrupt opponent's game plan and find Pox
Play lands consistently to ensure Pox and removal are accessible
Deploy Orcish Bowmasters early to apply pressure and remove key threats
mid_game: Cast Pox when the opponent has multiple creatures on the board
Use Sinkhole to eliminate large threats that Pox cannot handle alone
Develop board presence with cheap creatures to capitalize on Pox's effect
late_game: Maintain card advantage by trading efficiently with Sinkhole and Bowmasters
Attack with resilient low-cost creatures while opponent's threats are weakened
Stabilize against combo attempts by holding up interaction and Pox

key_cards.name: Orcish Bowmasters
key_cards.notes: Use its triggered ability to remove opponent's key creatures or planeswalkers. Under Pox, it becomes a resilient 2/1 attacker that can outlast many threats.

key_cards.name: Sinkhole
key_cards.notes: Prioritize using it on high-toughness creatures or artifacts that bypass Pox. Hold it up to answer threats that would otherwise close the game.

key_cards.name: Thoughtseize
key_cards.notes: Cast on turn one to strip opponent's best cards, find Pox, or disrupt combo sequences. Use it to delay aggressive strategies or remove key interaction.

sequencing_tips: Hold Thoughtseize until you see a key threat or combo piece before committing it
Play Pox only when the opponent has multiple creatures to maximize board impact
Use Sinkhole on threats that Pox cannot reduce to 0/1, such as artifacts or indestructible creatures
Trigger Orcish Bowmasters' ability on high-value targets to generate card advantage

matchups.advice: Prioritize Pox to shut down their creature swarm, then use Thoughtseize to strip key finishers. Attack with cheap creatures to race them.
watch_for: Lack of interaction in their opening hand

matchups.advice: Use Thoughtseize to disrupt their game plan and hold Pox until they commit multiple creatures. Race with Orcish Bowmasters while they search for answers.
Disrupt early with Thoughtseize to break up combo pieces. Play Pox to stop creature-based combos and use Sinkhole on key artifacts or permanents.
